The wire, in three moves

01

Send in twenty seconds

Client, amount, due date — done. Your terms, your logo, your currency. Templates remember everything so invoice #40 is faster than #1.

02

The chase runs itself

Polite on day 1, firm on day 7, late fees on day 14 — automatic reminders you configure once and never think about again. You stay the good cop.

03

Money lands live

Cards, transfers, wallets — payment links in every invoice. The feed updates the second the money moves, and your tax report writes itself.

3 days faster. Every invoice.
